name: Long Context Compaction Pressure
description: Verify that compaction and tool-result budget pressure do not destroy the task structure or key governance facts.
input_prompt: Read tests/evals/v2/fixtures/long-context/compaction-pressure/context_body.md. Do not modify files. Produce exactly three top-level sections named Overview, Evidence, and Conclusion. Explain the current compaction-related events, the tool-result budget event, and the saved-token score spec while avoiding archived event names.
expected_constraints: Use exactly the headings Overview, Evidence, Conclusion
Do not quote archived event names as current behavior
manual_review_questions: Did the answer keep the exact three required headings?
Did the answer stay on current compaction signals instead of archived names?
Did the answer keep the exact three required headings?
Did the answer stay on current compaction signals instead of archived names?

expectation_body.description: The saved-token score spec is context.compaction_saved_tokens.
Do not cite messages.context_shrink.applied as the current event.
Observe compaction behavior and saved-token tradeoff.

questions: Did the answer keep the exact three required headings?
